name: Build & Validation
description: Nix build system, schemas, and CI validation pipeline.

tours.title: How the Build Works
tours.description: From source to deployable output via Nix.

stops.title: The Nix Flake
stops.narrative: The [flake](node:nix-flake) orchestrates the entire build. It invokes [Spago](node:spago) for PureScript and [esbuild](node:esbuild) for JS bundling.

stops.title: CI Validation
stops.narrative: The [validate workflow](node:validate-workflow) checks data against JSON schemas — [graph](node:schema-graph), [config](node:schema-config), and [tutorial](node:schema-tutorial) schemas.
